entry.title: 上新啦！SAP 分析云 2024.11 版功能更新
entry.content:
SAP 分析云是一款先进的商务分析云解决方案，集商业智能 (BI)、增强分析、预测分析和企业规划功能于一体，消除单点解决方案和数据孤岛挑战，能提供您需要的全面云分析功能。

本文介绍了 SAP 分析云 2024.11 版本的新功能。这些新功能已经在 SAP 分析云 FastTrack 客户的系统上线。对于 SAP 分析云季度发布周期 (QRC) 客户，此版本及其功能将作为 QRC 2024 年第3季度版本的一部分提供。在此处可以查看 QRC 发布时间表。 

系统和技术要求

尽管不是必需的，我们推荐您升级到最新的 SAP 分析云代理版本1.0.407，以利用所有数据采集类型。

代理的最低版本仍为 1.0.75，但以下情况除外：

  • SAP ERP/SQL 数据库的版本 1.0.99
  • SAP universe （UNX） 的版本 1.0.365（SAP 分析云代理需要其他设置步骤，有关详细信息，请参阅 SAP 说明 3262098）
  • SAP Business Warehouse （BW） 的版本 1.0.353
  • SAP HANA View 的版本 1.0.235
  • File Server版本 1.0.248

有关详细信息，请参阅系统要求和技术先决条件。

有关SAP BW与SAP分析云集成的支持功能和需求更新，请参阅SAP Note 2541557了解更多详细信息。

有关通过 SAP分析云的 SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect 实时访问Universe时的支持功能和需求更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2771921了解更多详细信息。

请从“Service Marketplace”下载最新版本的简易部署工具包。

  • 注意：为避免下载旧版本，以及可能让用户面对Cloud Connector 与 SAPJVM 或 Apache Tomcat 的不当绑定问题，只有三个最新版本的工具包可供下载。

有关云代理版本变更管理详情，请参阅 SAP Note 3264839。

更新亮点

  • 管理和服务管理
    • 防止丢失通过 BTP 意外删除的 SAP 分析云租户
  • 数据发掘
    • 在数据分析器中为两个结构BW查询添加对结构成员的计算
    • 数据分析器中保留上次使用值
  • 数据集成
    • 数据导出 API – 增量差异
    • 支持基于 OData 连接的 X509 证书身份验证
  • 故事设计
    • 优化故事体验现在支持导出为 Google 幻灯片
    • 在地理可视化对象中，精简版查看器现在支持按维着色的气泡图层
  • 故事可扩展性
    • 以动态文本或脚本 API 的形式检索非输入就绪变量

 

管理和服务管理

防止丢失通过 BTP 意外删除的 SAP 分析云租户

如果您不小心在 SAP BTP 主控室中删除了服务实例，可在七天内恢复。点击此处此处了解更多信息。

 

数据发掘

在数据分析器中为两个结构BW查询添加对结构成员的计算

在“可用对象”面板的“结构”部分中增加了“+添加计算”按钮。这样就可以在 BW的两个结构化查询中使用结构成员创建计算。

 

数据分析器中保留上次使用值

现在，上次使用的已定义部件和交互值将被保留，在重新打开数据分析器时，选项将保持不变。数据分析器用户现在可以设置以下内容：

  • 默认显示/隐藏过滤器行
  • 分别打开/关闭样式面板和构建器面板和可用对象列表
  • 默认情况下，展开/折叠样式设置面板和生成器面板和可用对象列表
  • 默认情况下，在数据源浏览器中设置系统和连接类型
  • 保留 PDF、Microsoft Excel 和 CSV 导出对话框中的所有设置（导出名称除外）

 

数据集成

数据导出 API - 增量差异

数据导出服务 API 订阅已扩展，以支持在执行增量提取时计算新旧数值增量值之间的差异，而不仅仅是新度量值。

 

基于 OData 连接的 X509 证书身份验证

用户现在可以选择客户端证书身份验证，并将 X.509 证书用于通用 OData 连接、SAP Business ByDesign Analytics 和 SAP S4/HANA Cloud 连接。

 

故事设计

优化故事体验现在支持导出为 Google 幻灯片

优化故事体验现在支持导出为 Google 幻灯片。Google 幻灯片可以另存为新演示文稿，也可以添加到 Google Drive 文件夹现有演示文稿中。

精简查看器中不支持这一功能。

 

地理可视化对象中，精简版查看器现在支持按维着色的气泡图层

精简查看器现在支持地理地图中的气泡图层按维着色。按维着色的气泡图层将不再自动重新定向到完整查看器。

“地理可视化对象”的交互性也有一些改进：

对地理可视化的交互性进行了一些改进，其中包括：

  • 改进了与按维着色的气泡的交互
  • 使用工具提示合并钻取
  • 改进阈值工具提示

 

故事可扩展性

在优化故事体验中，动态文本和与变量相关的脚本 API（如 getVariables 和 getVariableValues）现在支持非输入就绪变量。

从与 SAP Business Warehouse （SAP BW） 的实时连接中检索未准备好输入的变量，例如客户出口变量：

  • 作为动态文本
  • 通过脚本 API
    • getDataSource（）.getVariableValues（）
    • getDataSource（）.getVariables

 

本文仅提供 SAP 分析云的最新功能和改进功能的高级概述。您可以在针对FastTrack客户的应用内帮助指南中找到有关这些功能的更多详细信息，如果您想了解更多关于FastTrack和季度发布周期发布的信息，请参阅这篇SAP 知识库文章。

如果您对本博文的内容有任何疑问，可以在下方发表评论。如果您有具体的产品或技术问题，请在我们的 SAP Analytics Cloud 问答论坛上提问。访问我们的 SAP Analytics Cloud 社区页面，了解更多产品信息、卓越实践等。查看我们的 SAP 路线图浏览器，了解 SAP Analytics Cloud 即将推出的更多功能。

entry.title: Best of Suite vs. Modern Data Stack
entry.content:
I just have seen a talk between Martin Kleppmann and Jesse Anderson about “Designing A Data-Intensive Future” from GOTO 2023 event. Martin Kleppmann and he said “When you get to large data workload, if you have a single tool that can do everything, the only way that can do that is by doing everything badly.“

I think this is a basic idea where the Modern Data Stack (MDS) evolve from. The idea of Modern Data Stack and how it evolved, is described in my former blog Data Architecture with SAP – Modern Data Stack. Over the time many characteristics where added what a MDS must archive:

 

Fig. 1: Characteristics of the Modern Data Stack

The idea was, to create a Best-of-Breed software architecture for data, which brought together the best fit of data capabilities needed to create maximum of value from data for the enterprise. But is this idea of having always the best tool doing this job is still valid?

While Best-of-Breed is not a new idea, we have seen the pendulum swings from Best-of-Breed to Best-of-Suite in the data world and back again. Currently even the end of the MDS was proclaimed. Why? Because over time several developments happend:

  • Customers became more price sensitive and data tools became standard in companies. Standards are goal for optimization so it is easier to manage licences, support, etc by one or at least a few reduces complexity and costs.

  • Differentiation between providers is increasingly disappearing. The evolution of cloud services is fast. From the capability perspective Best-of-Suite solutions like SAP and Oracle catched up. It is more about evolution speed, partnership and details now.

  • MDS is converging to a Best-of-Suite. I see that particularly for Google Cloud with BigQuery in the center of the stack where Google is able to offer a End-to-End approach and simliar for Databricks except the BI part. Snowflake is possibly still the most representative MDS data platform and really celebrating the ecosystem idea with strong partnerships. But they are also growing there own stack with innovations like Streamlit, Snowpipe and Snowpark.

  • Customers coming from one side shifting over time to a mixed scenario to adapt to the advantages of the other side. Means customer starting e. g. with Databricks on Microsoft Azure adapting more and more Azure services over time as the Suite approach making things easier (integration, less vendors, good enough services, …). Same If you start with a suite but extend for new BI tools, ETL/ELT and other components to complete or compensate.

  • Best-of-Suite vendors like SAP are embracing data ecosystems with partners like Collibra, DataRobot, Confluent and Databrick to close gaps and offer alternatives for a better adaption of the data stack.

  • Maybe a short term trend but something I see, is the shifted focus from data to AI with the ChatGPT/LLM hype. Maybe this pendelum will come back when people understand that data is the base for AI and even more for data-centric AI (compared to discriminative/generative AI).

  • Once I read, the biggest lie of a data architecture picture is that there is only one data platform in the middle. There is at least one old, one new, one from an acquisition, in germany at least you will find a extra one for HR. From a certain size or complexity companies today have several data platforms and redundant tools. It’s the new normal somehow.

The last aspect brings us to a new perspective. We need maybe best of both worlds because every world (Best-of-Suite / Best-of-Breed) have their advantaged (and disadvantages).

 

Fig 2: Combining characteristics of Best-of-Breed (MDS) and Best-of-Suite (here: SAP) 

So now if we think a little bit further, these worlds are converging into a open ecosystem which not only adapts to the best fit for creating value from data, but also adapt optimal to the operational ecosystem like SAP driven enterprises as a next level of ecosystems.

 Fig. 3: Convergence of MDS and Best-of-Suite vendors into a data ecosystem

We thougt deeply about this development in our latest whitepaper about SAP & Modern Data Stack available here (1) (in german only at the moment).

An extended excerpt can be found here with Snowflake and here with Databricks.

What do you think or experience where data stacks evolve? Is one vendor delivering everything for you and doing well? Do you build an ecosystem of tools to solve complex problems or is the MDS-approach still the best helping you in your daily data business?

-----------------------

This blog was initially posted on Substack.

----------------------- 

(1) https://www.infomotion.de/whitepaper-sap-modern-data-stack

entry.title: 【重要なお知らせ】SAP Analytics Cloud：従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスとアナリティクスアプリケーションに関する変更
entry.content:
このブログはImportant Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud C... - SAP Communityを日本語訳したものになります。

はじめに

長年お客様とパートナーにサービスを提供してきた従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスとアナリティクスアプリケーションを廃止いたします。テクノロジーの進化とユーザーの期待の変化に伴い、従来の機能に加え、より多くの機能・汎用性・パフォーマンス向上・使いやすさを備えた最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスへの移行を決定いたしました。最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスはストーリー、アナリティクスアプリケーション、およびDigital Boardroomのコア機能を統合し、SAP Analytics Cloudユーザーライセンスでご利用いただけます。

本ブログでは、従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスを廃止する理由、最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスの利点、移行スケジュールについて説明いたします。このブログ記事が皆様の変化への準備と最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスの最大限の活用に役立てば幸いです。

従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスを廃止する理由

従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスは、信頼性が高く安定したUIでしたが、ユーザーエクスペリエンスやパフォーマンスに影響するいくつかの制限や欠点もありました。非推奨とする主な理由は以下のとおりです：

  • パフォーマンスとユーザビリティ：お客様からいただいたフィードバックによると、従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスには、パフォーマンスとユーザビリティに関していくつかの課題がありました。
  • 統一性：ビジネスのユースケースに応じて、どのアセット（ストーリー、アナリティクスアプリケーション、Digital Boardroom）を使うべきかの判断が難しいことがありました。
  • イノベーション：最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスのみに対して新機能の搭載や改善を行っています。

最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスの利点

最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスはストーリー、アナリティクスアプリケーション、およびDigital Boardroomのコア機能を組み合わせたプラットフォームで、SAP Analytics Cloud ユーザーライセンスで利用することができます。従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスにはない新しい機能、多様性、より優れたパフォーマンスとユーザビリティを一貫して提供します。

利点の詳細については、リソースセクションの外部ブログ記事をお読みください。

スケジュールと影響

従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスおよびそれに関連する機能と、製品戦略上、非推奨とするその他の機能について段階的な廃止を進めています。

廃止の対象は以下の機能です：

  • 従来のストーリー（グリッドレイアウトとスマートディスカバリを含む）
  • アナリティクスアプリケーション（ストーリーと統合）（ブログ）
  • Digital Boardroom（ストーリーと統合）（ブログ）
  • 従来のストーリーとアナリティクスアプリケーションにおける利用頻度の低い機能（ヘルプポータル）
  • インサイト検索（Cloud FoundryテナントではJust Askに置き換わる）
  • 割当（データアクション割当ステップに置き換わる）
  • POI（Point of Interest）

段階的な移行を促進するための機能を順次追加しており、すでに利用可能になっているものもいくつかあります。例えば：

  • 従来の割当メニューを選択すると、新しいデータアクション割当ステップを利用するようにユーザーをガイドする警告が表示されます。
  • 2024年5月18日付で公開したSAP Analytics Cloudの2024年Q2 QRCリリースでは、従来のストーリーとアナリティクスアプリケーションを編集モードで開いた際に、アプリ内非推奨警告を表示します。

移行スケジュールについて以下の点にご注意ください。なお、これは現時点での計画であり、SAPによって今後変更される可能性があります：

  • 2024年 Q4 QRC：新規に作成されたテナントは、上記の非戦略的な機能を利用することができません。作成済みコンテンツパッケージに廃止対象のアセット（従来のストーリーエクスペリエンス、アナリティクスアプリケーションなど）が含まれている場合、そのパッケージはインポートすることができません。
  • 2025年 上半期：既存テナントを使用中のお客様は、廃止対象のアセットを新規作成または複製することができなくなります。ただし作成済みアセットの閲覧、編集、共有は引き続き行うことができます。一定期間以上閲覧されていないアセットを自動削除するための新しい設定オプションがシステム管理者向けのメニューに追加されます。
  • 2025年 下半期：廃止対象アセットにアクセスできなくなります。期限までにコンテンツを移行する必要があります。

準備方法

この移行には、お客様側での計画や準備が必要になる場合があります。ここでは、従来のストーリーとアナリティクスアプリケーションについて、移行に向けた準備手順をご紹介します：

  • 最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスとその利点については、リソースセクションの外部ブログ記事をお読みください。
  • 最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスで利用できなくなる機能の詳細はドキュメントでご覧いただけます。：最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスの制限事項について | SAP Help Portal
  • 既存の従来のストーリーとアナリティクスアプリケーションのデザイナでツールバーの［ファイル］－［保存］－［最適化されたデザインエクスペリエンスに変換］オプションを使用し、最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスに移行します。

おわりに

従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスの廃止と最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスへの移行は、お客様とパートナー様にとって長期的にメリットのある戦略的判断です。この移行プロセスへのご理解とご協力に感謝いたします。弊社は、引き続き最高レベルのユーザーエクスペリエンスとパフォーマンスを提供することに尽力してまいります。

リソース（英語ブログ）

最適化されたエクスペリエンスのみの新機能ハイライト
  • コンポジット（日本語ヘルプポータル：コンポジット入門 | SAP Help Portal）
  • モデルの置換（日本語ヘルプポータル：ストーリー内のモデルの置換 (最適化済み) | SAP Help Portal）
  • プレゼンテーションモード（日本語ヘルプポータル：プレゼンテーションモードの使用 | SAP Help Portal）
アナリティクスアプリケーション統合のメリット
  • 新しいデザインエクスペリエンス
  • ストーリーとアナリティクスアプリケーションの統合
パフォーマンスとユーザビリティの向上
  • アクティブビューポートレンダリング
  • 簡易ビューア（日本語ヘルプポータル：簡易ビューアの使用制限 | SAP Help Portal）
  • 主な改善点と特徴
  • パフォーマンスとユーザビリティの向上

entry.title: Unlocking AI Potential with SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)
entry.content:
As SAP Sapphire 2024 approaches, we invite you to explore the exciting world of AI within SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Whether you are attending in person at Orlando or Barcelona, or joining us virtually, these resources will empower you to infuse AI into your applications and drive innovation

BTP Interactive learning tools: Get guidance with available SAP resources covering aspects like application development, integration, data analytics, and AI

  1. Build Code Test Drive: Experiment without risks 
  1. Code Samples: Generative AI hub starter kit 
  1. Reference architecture: Optimal setup guides 
  1. Step-by-Step Guidance: Detailed implementation instructions on SAP Discovery Center 

Knowledge Building Tools: Collaborate and learn how to use Business AI to implement use cases with certification programs and hands-on developer tutorials

  1. Tutorials: Prompt LLMs in the generative AI hub in SAP AI Core & Launchpad | SAP Tutorials 
  1. Certification Programs: Recognized learning paths for Business AI 
  1. Developer Videos: Hands-on videos on BTP use cases with AI 
  1. Community: Be part of our new public group for AI enthusiasts 

Expert Assistance: Find resources to support your BTP AI journey

  1. SAP Certified Partners: Find SAP Partners 
  1. Tailored SAP Support: SAP Support Portal

entry.title: Navigating Stories Via the Keyboard – Accessibility Update in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
There is news from SAP Analytics Cloud in the area of accessibility. For all users who use the keyboard functionality when viewing stories or are interested in the topic, here is an insight into the new functionalities for keyboard navigation of the story view mode.

Keyboard navigation is essential for making an application accessible to users with motor impairments or people relying on assistive technology like screen readers or modified keyboards. For seamless, accessible use, it is therefore important that SAP Analytics Cloud can also be navigated exclusively using the keyboard.

For this reason, we are pleased to announce that SAP Analytics Cloud stories are now keyboard accessible for story viewers. It is possible to navigate the story view mode in optimized story solely via the keyboard. In this blog we want to provide you with an overview of how keyboard navigation in the story view mode works.

What does this mean in detail?

SAP Analytics Cloud now provides keyboard support to story viewers which allows them to

  • navigate toolbars and viewer-oriented dialogs
  • navigate and create filters in view mode (story and page filters)
  • navigate to the canvas via tab and navigation between widgets via arrows
  • navigate the table widget
  • navigate the more actions menu

 

How does the navigation work?

In SAP Analytics Cloud the targeted object is visibly in focus during keyboard navigation. For some users it can help to additionally enable an enhanced highlight on the focused object in the browser’s accessibility settings to facilitate navigation further.

To ensure smooth use, here is a summary of the most important information to help you operate SAC stories with the keyboard. When you enter a story in view mode, you have four main groups on the screen you can navigate through. These are

  1. the shell bar,
  2. the toolbar with viewer-oriented dialogs,
  3. the filter bar and
  4. the canvas that consists of different widgets and forms the story itself

 General Page Navigation

To skip groups, the F6 key can be used. This would lead you from the shell bar to the first element of the toolbar for instance.

The individual elements of each group can be navigated with tab. An example for this might be the toolbar. If you want to go from the File dialog to the Edit dialog and so forth, use tab.

If you want to go back, add the shift key. Shift + F6 brings you to the group before and Shift + Tab navigates back to the element before.

Canvas Navigation

To guarantee coherent use of the story itself with all its widgets (the canvas), the keyboard navigation there works slightly different to the above outlined. Picture the story canvas like it is a list. Every widget on that canvas, whether it is a chart, a table or a map is one item on this list.

  1. Page Filter

  2. Chart
  3. Table
  4. Geo Map

 The first step to enter onto this list happens with tab or F6 from the toolbar or the filter bar for example. This will focus the first widget (or first item on the list) of the story canvas. From here, you can move around the different widgets with the arrow keys, up, down, left and right.

If you want to navigate into a widget, use tab. This will bring you to the “More Actions” (…) menu of a widget. Using tab once more will direct you into the widget’s content. This is possible for widgets with navigable content. Find here a list of widgets for which this is possible:

  • Dropdown
  • Button
  • Checkbox group
  • Switch
  • Radio button group
  • Input field
  • Text area
  • Slider
  • Data Action Trigger
  • List box
  • Table
  • Input Control

 

If you want to find a more detailed overview on different shortcuts and navigation functionalities of the different widgets, please visit the help documentation of SAP Analytics Cloud.

Tip: If you are looking for quick information on navigating within SAP Analytics Cloud, you can activate the help icon (?) in the shell bar, which provides an overview of the most important aspects of keyboard navigation.

The next steps we have planned to make SAP Analytics Cloud accessible is working to improve the screen reader functionalities of the optimized story view mode. So, stay tuned for further accessibility updates!

Contact Us

Accessibility is important as it allows everyone, including people who are differently abled, to access and use technology. Around 15 % of the population are touched by this topic (according to the World Health Organization). It is a diverse topic with a wide range of specific components.

For any additional clarity or questions please do not hesitate to reach out in the comment section below!

 

Additional Resources:

  • Help documentation
    • Content Viewing Accessibility - Use the Keyboard to Access Story Pages
    • Use Keyboard Shortcut List for Tables
  • Keyboard Accessibility – How the SAP Analytics Cloud Data Analyzer Can Be Navigated Via the Keyboard
  • Best Practices for Designing Accessible Stories
  • Transform Your Story – Best Practices for Designing Accessible Stories

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Need to Know (More in 2024)
entry.content:
Welcome to the SAP Analytics Cloud Need to Know (More in 2024) series of webinar recordings where I (Lead Solution Advisor for Analytics and Planning Solution - LinkedIn Profile) have been showing you how to use the Optimised Story Builder in SAP Analytics Cloud.

Last year I created a number of recordings and posted these in the SAP Analytics Cloud Need to Know Sessions where I took you through creating a new story using SAP Analytics Cloud.    This year the optimised design mode, which we used to create the report, has increased in the level of functionality that you can do within stories and this blog with recordings covers some of these enhancements.

From 31st May through to early July I will be recording new sessions that cover the following areas (click the link to access the recording)...

31st May (recording) – What is the New Optimised Story, creating our story and the new user interface.

7th June (recording) – Basics of Coding, including tricks and tips.

20th June – Composites and reusability of components.

26th June – Presentation Mode – what this is and how this can help.

5th July – Just Ask and beyond.

The idea is that over the course of the recordings, each recording will build upon the work done in the previous recording.   Please go through each recording in the order above.

These sessions are aimed at organisations who already subscribe to SAP Analytics Cloud and users create reports and who want to do more with their SAP Analytics Cloud reports.  We expect you to already have access to your SAP Analytics Cloud tenant.

Throughout each session I posted useful links which can be accessed below...

  • Using the SAP Analytics Optimised Story Experience help guide
  • Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
  • Free JavaScript Course https://code-basics.com/languages/javascript
  • Basic Scripting Skills Tutorial https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/acquiring-basic-scripting-skills-to-extend-stories-in-sap-analytics-cloud
  • API Guide Help https://help.sap.com/doc/1639cb9ccaa54b2592224df577abe822/2023.8/en-US/index.html
  • Daniel Davis Excellent Scripting Blog #1 https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/start-your-scripting-journey-the-easy-way-with-sap-analytics-cloud-part-one/ba-p/13576684
  • Daniel Davis Excellent Scripting Blog #2 https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/start-your-scripting-journey-the-easy-way-with-sap-analytics-cloud-part-two/ba-p/13577161
  • Flipping between a table and a chart tutorial (and more tutorials)  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/b9b58a72342845cd91c14fd2c2b9a06c.html?locale=en-US
  • Community SAC page covering scripting https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/cloud-analytics/analytic-applications-api

Enjoy, and I hope that you also enjoy using SAP Analytics Cloud.

Dean.

entry.title: Unlock the full potential of SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere have revolutionized the way how the traditional SAP analytics and data warehousing businesses operate. Compared to the classic BW and BusinessObjects, the SAP Business Technology Platform offer benefits that drive efficiency, scalability, and innovations.

" Sometimes the cloud applications are seen as too close for the customizations and very distant to the ad-hoc development, especially if it's compared to the traditional ABAP development or with the BO SDK."

This is not true!

This article is born by the experience on the field from the SAP Services Adoption Center, that supports everyday partners and customers to get the best out of the SAP Business Technology Platform; In this blog we are going to unveil some very important customization points that you should know while implementing projects for the enterpise. 

In the context of SAP BTP analytics and data management, hardcore development represents a way to solve complex requirements where there is no "out of the box" functionality available; developers wants to push the boundaries of technology to create robust, high-performance, and scalable solutions. This type of development is characterized by a relentless focus on optimizing code, deep understanding of the cloud infrastructure interaction, and the ability to solve complex problems under extreme constraints. Whether it's building a tailored UI components for SAP Analytics Cloud or developing interactive applications for SAP Datasphere, this blog will offer a good collection of use cases that you can easily reuse.

 

The following collection of advanced use cases is going to be regularly updated. Stay tuned !

  • SAP Datasphere News in May

 

 

Push SAP Analytics Cloud to the next levelPush SAP Datasphere to the next level

Realize your custom widget 

Now that Custom Widget is available with the Unified Story Experience since QRC/Q2 - 2023, and Widget Add-Ons since QRC/Q4 - 2023, we received a large amount of requests coming from SAC users searching for Samples in order to extend the Built-in set of visualisations in SAC.

  • SAP Public GitHub repository
  • Custom Widget Hands-on Guide
  • Custom Widget & Widget Add-Ons Samples Preview
  • Demystifying Custom Widgets for SAP Analytics Cloud
  • Diving into Custom Widgets with SAP Analytics Cloud

Boost the integration

SAP Analytics Cloud is extremely efficient when it's combinated with SAP Datasphere, here a collection of plug and play usecasaes

  • KPI-Dashboard with SAC and Datasphere
  • Extending SAC Planning - Acessing planning data with SAP Datasphere

Work with the API

The API allows third-party applications to access data stored on an SAP Analytics Cloud tenant. The API is best used for requesting small amounts of data in real time. You must have a tenant URL and SAP Analytics Cloud user. You must also configure OAuth to work with your application before you can use the REST API

  • Official guide from SAP Help
  • APIs: Getting Started Guide
  • Openness and flexibility with SAP Analytics Cloud’s APIs for data import and export ( Devtoberfest Sep 2023 )
  • Consume SAP APIs using oAuth and Node on GitHub code
  • Consume SAP APIs using oAuth and Hana XSA as  Community article

 

Use the power of Hana Cloud

  • Use the Datasphere data in BTP by sharing your space data 

 

The power of CLI

The SAP Datasphere Command Line Interface is a powerfull tool to interact with Dataphere not using the regular web interface but using your terminal. This approach gives you massive benefits in terms of rapidity and automations.

  • Official guide from SAP Help
  • Command-Line Interface for SAP Datasphere: Overview
  • Transformation Flow partition generation with SAP Datasphere CLI

Realize your own application & Integration

SAP Datasphere can be integrated with SAP Buid, SAP Build Code and SAP Business Application Studio to realize amazing applications on your data with read\write options.

  • Enable end-user data entry into SAP Datasphere via SAP Build Apps
  • Integrating with SAP Datasphere Consumption APIs using SAML Bearer Assertion

entry.title: Get Ready for a Data and AI Revolution: What's Hot at SAP SAPPHIRE 2024 - My personal picks!
entry.content:
Why SAP is Focusing on AI

SAP's strategic pivot towards AI is part of a comprehensive plan aimed at positioning the company for future growth. This initiative includes a significant investment in AI technologies to streamline operations and enhance efficiency. The creation of a dedicated AI growth area under the leadership of Dr. Philipp Herzig, SAP’s new Chief Artificial Intelligence Officer, underscores the centrality of AI in SAP’s future strategy. This move is designed to accelerate the development and deployment of AI solutions that can drive significant business value for SAP’s customers​ (SAP News Center)​​. You can find Dr. Herzig's session at SAPPHIRE here.

The Importance of SAP Datasphere

SAP Datasphere plays a crucial role in this AI-driven landscape. It represents a comprehensive data management solution that enables businesses to manage, integrate, and utilize their data more effectively. SAP Datasphere simplifies complex data environments by creating a unified data fabric, allowing organizations to access and leverage their data seamlessly. This capability is essential for maximizing the value of AI applications, which rely on high-quality, integrated data to function optimally​.

Datasphere's recent innovations, including the introduction of a knowledge graph and enhanced integration features, make it a pivotal tool for businesses looking to harness the power of data and AI. These advancements help companies transform their data into actionable insights, driving better decision-making and operational efficiency.

With close to 130 sessions at SAPPHIRE, the content can be a bit overwhelming. Below I've listed my top 10 sessions you should attend in my view.

Key Sessions on Data and AI

  1. Data in the Age of AI

    • Speakers: Irfan Khan, Dan Yu, Peter Howland
    • Overview: Discover how to maximize data value across SAP and third-party systems, with insights from Hershey's data transformation journey.
    • Session ID: BTP189

  2. Bringing AI from Prototype to Production

    • Speaker: Walter Sun
    • Overview: Learn about the journey of AI from prototype to production, focusing on identifying valuable AI applications and overcoming implementation challenges.
    • Session ID: TRE307

  3. Business Data Fabric: The Future of Data and AI

    • Speaker: Kaiser Larsen
    • Overview: Explore how SAP Datasphere simplifies data landscapes and empowers organizations.
    • Session ID: BTP151v

  4. SAP Datasphere: Looking Forward

    • Speaker: Torsten Ammon
    • Overview: Gain insights into new features and innovations in SAP Datasphere.
    • Session ID: BTP113

  5. Navigating the AI Era with SAP: Insights from the Executive Suite

    • Speakers: Andreas Welsch, Julia White, Michael Nilles, Walter Sun
    • Overview: Exclusive perspectives on the future of AI with SAP Business AI solutions.
    • Session ID: BAI220v

  6. Experience SAP Business AI in Action

    • Speaker: Richard Grandpierre
    • Overview: Demonstration of the Joule copilot and its impact on efficiency and decision-making.
    • Session ID: BAI900v

  7. Managing Your AI Risk: Responsible AI

    • Speaker: Dr. Bettina Laugwitz
    • Overview: Learn about mitigating AI bias and ensuring trust, privacy, and security.
    • Session ID: TRE312

  8. Learn About SAP's Responsible AI Practices

    • Speaker: Dr. Bettina Laugwitz
    • Overview: Understand SAP's commitment to ethical AI innovations.
    • Session ID: BAI206v

  9. Discover Recent and Upcoming AI Innovations for Business Functions

    • Speaker: Kai Muehlbauer
    • Overview: Learn about the Joule copilot AI Foundation and upcoming AI capabilities.
    • Session ID: BAI202

  10. Unlock the Potential of Your Data Assets: Data-Driven Decision-Making

    • Speaker: Frank Gundlich
    • Overview: Leverage technology and innovation to reshape decision-making processes.
    • Session ID: PAR309v

Conclusion

SAP SAPPHIRE 2024 is a great event for those interested in the latest advancements in Data and AI and SAP is going all in. With a diverse array of sessions, attendees will gain valuable insights into how these technologies can transform their businesses. Don't miss the opportunity to explore these sessions and stay ahead in the rapidly evolving landscape of Data and AI.

It's free, go for it.

For more information and to register for the event, visit the SAP SAPPHIRE 2024 event page and the virtual event page
